title: Clantaano (disambiguation)
content:
'''Clantaano''' may refer to one of the following:
==Canon==
*'''[[Clantaano system]]''', a [[Star system|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]
==Legends==
*'''[[Clantaano III]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Clantaano system/Legends|Clantaano system]]
*'''[[Clantaano system/Legends|Clantaano system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] containing the planet Clantaano III

{{Disambig}}
